title: Minnesota DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Minnesota DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (DEED DDS Division), the Disability Examiner classification (class 0871, grid 14G, code 07L, MAPE Unit 214), confirmed 2023-2025 salary range ($24.20–$35.13/hr → $50,530–$73,081) and 2025-2027 wage adjustments (+1.5% 2025, +1.75% 2026), MAPE wage-increase history, official MMB class-spec + MAPE contract sources, and the unconfirmed supervisor classification. Companion to MN/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Minnesota Management and Budget (MMB) / MAPE; MN DEED Disability Determination Services Division
source.title: MN DDS salary research notes (MMB class 0871 spec + MAPE 2023-25 / 2025-27 contract)

notes: Authoritative for the examiner: class code 0871 and grid 14G confirmed from the MMB class spec, with documented MAPE wage adjustments. Annual = hourly × 2080 FTE. Open gaps: supervisor class code/union (AFSCME C5 vs MMA) unconfirmed, exact step count not exposed, full 2025-27 pay grid would need direct MMB/MAPE PDF access.
